sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Terminology 30:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Terminology 30:1
items.html: Shibolet HaZakan are phases of AHP that emerged from the first Rosh of Dikna, for the first three corrections of Dikna are GE, meaning the Rosh of Dikna. Shibolet HaZakan is AHP that emerged from the Rosh of Dikna to the phase of Guf, where the abundance of the first three phases of correction of the Dikna accumulate. (Part 6, Item 20, and Inner Light, Item 23)
